mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry (member_idx, category, title, content, file_path, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{member_idx}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{file_path}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT i.inquiry_idx, i.member_idx, i.category, i.title, i.content, i.file_path, i.status, i.created_at, i.updated_at, m.member_nickname, m.member_email FROM inquiry i LEFT JOIN member m ON i.member_idx = m.member_idx WHERE i.inquiry_idx = #{inquiry_idx} AND i.member_idx = #{member_idx}

SELECT i.inquiry_idx, i.member_idx, i.category, i.title, i.content, i.file_path, i.status, i.created_at, i.updated_at, m.member_nickname, m.member_email FROM inquiry i LEFT JOIN member m ON i.member_idx = m.member_idx WHERE i.inquiry_idx = #{inquiry_idx}
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiry SET category = #{category}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, file_path = #{file_path}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE inquiry_idx = #{inquiry_idx} AND member_idx = #{member_idx}
UPDATE inquiry SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE inquiry_idx = #{inquiry_idx}
UPDATE inquiry SET status = '삭제', updated_at = NOW() WHERE inquiry_idx = #{inquiry_idx} AND member_idx = #{member_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM inquiry WHERE status != '삭제' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM inquiry WHERE status != '삭제' GROUP BY status

select i.inquiry_idx, i.member_idx, i.category, i.title, i.content, i.file_path, i.status, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.is_read, m.member_nicnkname from inquiry i inner join member m where i.member_idx = m.member_idx order by i.inquiry_idx desc

select count(*) from inquiry i LEFT JOIN member m ON i.member_idx = m.member_idx
i.category = #{category} and
i.category = #{category} and
i.category = #{category} and
i.category = #{category} and
i.category = #{category} and
i.title LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
i.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
SELECT inquiry_idx, member_idx, category, title, content, file_path, status, created_at, updated_at FROM inquiry WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx} ORDER BY created_at DESC
